headline: Is It Too Late To Consider McKesson (MCK) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether McKesson's share price still offers value after its strong run, this article walks through the numbers in a clear, practical way. Over the most recent periods, McKesson's share price closed at US$995.69 with returns of 4.0% over 7 days, 19.8% over 30 days, 20.9% year to date and 55.3% over 1 year, while the 3 year return is close to 3x and the 5 year return is very large. Recent news coverage around McKesson has focused on its role as a major healthcare...
